title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 2.050 - Distribution of session laws
text:
2.050.  Distribution of session laws. — The complete printed copies of laws, resolutions, constitutional amendments and measures when printed and bound shall be delivered to the revisor of statutes who shall distribute one copy without cost to each member of the general assembly and one copy each, without cost, to every county circuit clerk, circuit judge, associate circuit judge, prosecuting attorney, and sheriff.  One copy each, without cost, shall be delivered to other officers, institutions and agencies who are entitled to copies of the Revised Statutes of Missouri under section 3.130, if requested.
(RSMo 1939 §§ 667, 669, A.L. 1945 p. 1112; RSMo 1939 § 2076; A. 1949 S.B. 1002, A.L. 1957 p. 587, A.L. 1997 S.B. 459, A.L. 2004 S.B. 1211) 
Prior revisions: 1929 §§ 667, 669, 1912; 1919 §§ 7070, 7072, 2416; 1909 §§ 8069, 8071, 3934 
Laws and court reports destroyed by fire, replacement by secretary of state, 477.390
